title: Plan Expedition
summary: Traverse evaluates the governed expedition workflow and assembles a final expedition plan.

request.goal: Plan a two-day alpine expedition for a four-person team.

state_updates.title: Discovering capability
state_updates.detail: Looking up expedition.planning.plan-expedition@1.0.0 in the private-first registry.

state_updates.title: Evaluating constraints
state_updates.detail: Confirmed local execution is allowed for the approved expedition capability.

state_updates.title: Executing workflow
state_updates.detail: Running the approved workflow steps to capture intent, assess conditions, validate readiness, and assemble the plan.

state_updates.title: Publishing governed events
state_updates.detail: Emitting expedition objective, interpreted intent, conditions summary, readiness, and assembled plan events.

state_updates.title: Completed
state_updates.detail: The final expedition plan is ready for review.

output.route: North Glacier approach with base-camp ascent
output.weather_summary: Cold start with stable winds and acceptable avalanche risk by midday.
output.next_action: Review equipment checklist and confirm departure window.
